metar.rawOb: METAR KOZR 180155Z AUTO 20006KT 10SM CLR 23/16 A2998 RMK AO2 SLP152 T02270160 $

sevenDay.synopsis: Things are looking good this morning minus a small area of IFR cigs W of Andalusia. We will remain VFR and NEG hazards for all 3 periods. Winds pick up tomorrow as a frontal boundary nears. The front moves thru Sunday AM, and there's a slight chance for a few light showers. Winds will be gusty behind the front, and temps will drop just a bit. Breezy again on Monday, but winds ease up on Tuesday, and the rest of next week is looking great for training!
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 17 APR - 23 APR
